title: Agent Skill frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a SKILL.md against the Agent Skills open standard (agentskills.io) plus this repo's conventions.

name.description: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only. Must exactly match the skill's folder name. Must not contain 'anthropic' or 'claude'.

description.description: What the skill does AND when to use it. Written in the third person, with trigger terms.

license.description: SPDX identifier, e.g. Apache-2.0 or MIT.

allowed-tools.description: Space-delimited list of tools the skill may use.

metadata.description: Free-form key/value pairs (author, version, tags, etc.).
